title: MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT - 211info
text: OUTPATIENT CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services, inpatient and outpatient chemical dependency treatment, and substance use disorder counseling. Treatment incorporates individual, group, and family counseling. Additional assistance includes DUII services, adolescent services, corrections services, smoking cessation, and primary medical care. 750 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 13 and older Hours: Intake hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Program hours vary Email (503) 363-2021 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 363-2021 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Medical assessment to be completed at program intake. FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Willamette Valley Community Health (WVCH), DMAP, and private pay. Some payment support available for Marion County residents only. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 13 nearby Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents DUI Offender Programs Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Smoking/Vaping Cessation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTPATIENT CLINIC
